completion_requirement: 每年必须有试卷与答案来源文件 并记录 sha256 source_document_id file_asset_id material_batch_key year original_file_name
evidence_required: source manifest report with 11 years and paper answer hash coverage
blocking_gap_policy: missing year source hash or answer file keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 每年必须实跑最低成本 adapter 并记录 adapter name version input/output hash warnings errors elapsed_ms
blocking_gap_policy: missing adapter diagnostic or unresolved high severity warning keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 每年必须有 expected question count manifest 且 question_items cut_candidates review_queue_items 与题号连续性一致
evidence_required: year batch ingest report with expected_count actual_count missing_question_numbers
blocking_gap_policy: missing expected count or any missing question keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 每题必须有答案或明确人工接管原因 答案来源页/片段与 source_hash 绑定
evidence_required: answer coverage report with per-question source anchor
blocking_gap_policy: missing answer without takeover reason keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 每题必须有可回看来源页和 SourceRegion bbox 作图题 实验题 题图题必须有截图级区域或题图资产
evidence_required: source region and asset report with no placeholder bbox except time-boxed gate_na
blocking_gap_policy: placeholder bbox without gate_na evidence keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 题干 选项 小问 答案 解析 公式 表格 图片字段必须结构化保存或进入 pending_review
evidence_required: question structure report and review queue reason
blocking_gap_policy: raw text only without review reason keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 知识点 题型 难度 标签必须来自 deterministic seed 或 AI candidate 并保持 pending_review 直到教师确认
evidence_required: tagging suggestion report with confidence source and no_active_write
blocking_gap_policy: tag missing or AI direct active write keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 教师或代理审核必须能确认 退回 修订答案/标签/来源 并写入 audit
evidence_required: review audit report with per-question terminal status and edited fields
blocking_gap_policy: open queue or no audit keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 审核后题目必须可保存并从题目详情回看来源页 区域 答案 标签和风险
evidence_required: API/UI smoke using real reviewed questions
blocking_gap_policy: source review failure keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 真实题目必须进入检索 题篮 组卷 导出预检 Word/PDF 导出链路 并保留版本/来源引用
evidence_required: search paper export smoke with real question ids
blocking_gap_policy: only synthetic fixture proof keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 学情分析和讲评报告只能引用已审核题目与 active 知识版本 AI 只生成 draft 文案
evidence_required: analysis smoke with real reviewed question ids and no formal history write
blocking_gap_policy: synthetic-only analysis proof keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 每个写库批次必须有 dry-run apply evidence targeted rollback SQL privacy=0 external_ai policy cost/cache/no_active_write evidence
evidence_required: rollback privacy and AI boundary report
blocking_gap_policy: missing rollback or privacy evidence keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 页眉页脚 考生信息区 装订线 考试注意事项 水印 页码等必须标为 noise/ignored 或从题目区域排除
evidence_required: layout noise report with per-page noise region and retained region counts
blocking_gap_policy: noise retained in question content without review reason keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: DOCX/WPS 公式必须保留 OMML 第一真源 LaTeX/MathML 派生 扫描公式必须保留 source crop fallback image confidence reviewStatus
evidence_required: formula fidelity report with OMML/LaTeX/fallback coverage
blocking_gap_policy: formula OCR candidate without fallback image or reviewStatus keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 表格必须结构化保存为 table block JSON 并保留来源截图 低置信度进入 pending_review
evidence_required: table structure report with rows columns sourceRegion confidence reviewStatus
blocking_gap_policy: table only stored as image without pending_review reason keeps closure not_closed

completion_requirement: 题干 答案 解析 标签 bbox 题图 表格 公式修改必须通过可审计编辑或重裁入口并记录原值新值操作者时间
blocking_gap_policy: manual correction path missing or no audit keeps closure not_closed
